plan.providerQuotaMode: default user Startup launcher spends no provider quota
plan.resultPollerMode: dedicated result poller will be started by the internal tester runtime manager at user logon
plan.settlementMode: approved trusted-result settlement scheduler is requested; execution still waits for CLOSED market and exact approval match
plan.startMode: runs when the Windows user logs in; not a production Windows service

p1: User Startup launcher is a local internal-testing fallback that runs at user logon only; it is not a production service, scheduled daemon, or health-monitored worker.
p2: Production service supervision and multi-event runtime install remain future work.
